message:
test(daemon): Add client configuration tests (bd-p4vs)

Add 14 client configuration tests bringing total daemon tests to 44:
- ClientConfig defaults, builder methods, Debug, Clone
- DaemonClient construction, Default trait, socket paths
- Tests don't require running daemon (pure config validation)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
